overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic downtown district. The character moves from a sunlit open street with towering buildings and digital billboards into covered walkways beneath elevated highways, passing parking garages with graffiti and atmospheric steam vents.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the street, passing futuristic buildings and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: white car driving down the street in the distance

entered.detail: tall building with WARMER signage and geometric red accents
large vertical billboard displaying purple beverage advertisement
billboard showing firearm advertisement with 2nd Amendment text
futuristic elevated roadway structure spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wide, sunlit futuristic street lined with towering commercial buildings. Digital billboards display advertisements on the right while the distinctive WARMER building with red geometric accents dominates the left side of the frame.

events.description: character walks into the shadow cast by the elevated highway overpass
transition from open street to semi-covered area beneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and moving toward the right side of the street under the overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shorts walking in the same direction

entered.detail: street sign reading Anderson with speed limit 40
multi-story parking structure with green and gray facade
massive concrete and steel elevated highway casting shadows below

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an intersection marked by an Anderson street sign and enters the shadow of an elevated highway overpass. The lighting shifts from bright sunlight to mixed shadows as the parking garage structure becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban corridor with parking garage and graffiti walls

tall street light with multiple lamps

segments.scene_description: Walking through the dimly lit corridor beneath the overpass, the character passes a multi-story parking garage on the left and a graffiti-covered wall on the right where people sit among trash piles and vending machines.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with steam vents and neon signage

events.description: steam vents release white smoke from above, creating atmospheric effect
character approaches the entrance of building marked with 03

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered walkway toward a commercial building entrance

notable_agents.action: person in pink jacket standing near building entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with numbers 03 on red and white building
vertical GUNS signage on the building facade
steam or smoke venting from pipes above the walkway
metal truss ceiling of the covered pedestrian walkway
colorful neon signs in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the covered walkway where steam vents create atmospheric effects overhead. Approaching a building marked with 03 and GUNS signage, the environment features neon lights and a metal truss ceiling while the parking garage recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open futuristic thoroughfare into the shadowed, industrial depths of a covered urban walkway. It begins on a wide, sunlit street lined with towering commercial buildings and digital billboards, with a red geometric structure dominating the left side of the frame. As the character approaches an intersection marked by an Anderson street sign, the lighting shifts from brilliant sunlight to mixed shadows upon entering the underside of an elevated highway overpass. The scene then transitions into a dimly lit corridor, passing a multi-story parking garage and graffiti-covered walls where people gather among trash piles and vending machines. Finally, the camera moves through a metal truss ceiling filled with atmospheric steam vents, heading toward neon-lit signage for a gun shop as the parking garage recedes into the background.
